# Add bins: `bio_bin` {#bin}

Taxonomic, geographic and temporal bins were added to the data as:

* `r paste0(names(scale$grain), ": ", scale$grain, collapse = "\n* ")`

where: spatial grain is in metres ('res' for resolution); and temporal grain is a period of time described using the [ISO 8601](https://www.iso.org/iso-8601-date-and-time-format.html) standard.

Geographic bins were added using the `add_raster_bin` function from *envRaster*, which realigns every record's location to the centroid of the raster cell (with a resolution of the spatial grain) into which it falls.
